name: Tom Tiffany
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $161,245 for Tom Tiffany in U.S. House, WI-07. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
